normal_form_condition: H_OPH o Theta_RG = H_OPH on Q_HT
defect_definition: epsilon_H = sup_x | H_r(rho_sr n_s(x)) - H_r(n_r rho_sr(x)) |
source_theorem_used: coarse-graining commutes with reconciliation up to max(epsilon_n, epsilon_h); exact naturality is zero-defect.
forbidden_inputs: measured Higgs, W, Z, or top mass
